abilities.name: Mirror Image
abilities.description: Track this cooldown!!! You MUST have this up when you start your cycle. Slaying a clone give you Damage Bonus.

abilities.name: Satsujin
abilities.description: This will consume ALL @node-red #Marks# from the enemy to deal even more damage. This has a PER ENEMY cooldown, keep track of this.

abilities.name: Surprise Strike
abilities.description: When in @node-blue #Vanish#, on your next hit, you will be revealed and deal #+80%# more damage.

abilities.name: Marked
abilities.description: @node-assassin #Spin-Attack# will be used to apply this. This is a huge damage increase.

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.description: This replaces @node-assassin #Multi-Hit# but doesn't replace @node-blue #Bamboozle#. This deals extra damage if you strike from behind or when you are facing the same direction as the enemy.

abilities.name: Sand-bagging
abilities.description: This is very important. When you are doing your cycle you must be in the enemy to reduce the cooldown of @node-red #Mirror Image#.

abilities.name: Mirage
abilities.description: Summons a clone after using @node-blue #Bamboozle# or Teleporting to your @node-pink #Shadow Projection#. This clone can activate @node-blue #Sandbagging#.

abilities.name: Foul Play
abilities.description: This will make @node-blue #Bamboozle# kill a @node-red #Mirror Clone# instead of having a cooldown.

abilities.name: Last Laugh
abilities.description: This will make @node-red #Mirror Clone# cast @node-assassin #Multi-Hit# or @node-pink #Backstab# when killed. Other clones will cast any one of your spells.

aspects.name: Trickster's Embodiment of Malevolent Mischief
aspects.description: You get this mainly for the #+1# @node-red Mirror Clone.

aspects.name: Aspect of Visual Distortion
aspects.description: Increases the Maximum @node-red Marked = More Dps.

aspects.name: Aspect of Unyielding Fate
aspects.description: Increase @node-pink Backstab angle. Good Quality of Life!

aspects.name: Aspect of the Pinwheel
aspects.description: Increases @node-assassin Spin-Attack range, Allowing for a easier time hitting enemies.
